communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

Supply the Investigative Memoranda with the following File Numbers:

INV-00081
INV-00082
INV-00083
INV-00084
INV-00085
INV-00086
INV-00087
INV-00088
INV-00089
INV-00090
INV-00091
INV-00092
INV-00093
INV-00094
INV-00095
INV-00096
INV-00097
INV-00098
INV-00099
INV-000100

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records concerning below:
Name: Richard Litka
Branch: United States Army
DOB: Jan 25, 1938
Dates of Service: 1958 to 1978
passed away 6/28/2009

Please provide the following documents:
1. copy of Silver Star Medal award citation
2. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citations
3. dates of service, list of awards
4. Purple heart award citations
Vietnam War 5th SFG 
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information. Redact per U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: Myron Hester, Complaints about Trista Harper

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Myron Hester, Complaints about Trista Harper
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

1. A log of all emails to/from the Myron Hester, Network Chief, from November 10, 2023 to November 20, 2023.

Please search all CPS email accounts as well as personal accounts used for public business. The log should include but not be limited to: sender, recipient(s), date and time, subject line, and attachment. I have included an attachment that was sent during this time window as an example.

You may remove all metadata related to students emailing Mr. Hester, as identified by their user permissions. 

This request is made on behalf of The FOIA Bakery. Because this request is in the public interest for Illinois nonprofit The FOIA Bakery’s work to advocate for public education, please waive any fees in accordance with 5 ILCS § 140/6(c). Feel free to contact me with any questions, or if clarification is needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Miriam Bhimani
